LightningComponentBundle.description: Pro-code payment form — a drop-in replacement for a payment Flow screen. Supports one-time and recurring payments with configurable currency and frequency toggle.

property.name: currency
property.label: Currency
property.description: ISO currency code shown next to the amount field (e.g. EUR, USD, GBP).

property.name: amount
property.label: Default Amount
property.description: Default amount pre-filled in the amount field. The donor/payer can still change it.

property.name: showFrequency
property.label: Show Frequency Toggle
property.description: Show the one-time / recurring frequency selector.

property.name: defaultFrequency
property.label: Default Frequency
property.description: Pre-selected frequency when the form loads.
